headline: A clear, fast process
subheadline: You’ll always know what’s happening, what you’ll get, and when we launch.

steps.title: Discovery
steps.text: Goals, audience, content, and examples. We align on scope and timeline.

steps.title: Design
steps.text: Layout, typography, and UI system that matches your brand and offer.

steps.title: Build
steps.text: Clean implementation, responsive polish, and performance-first details.

steps.title: Launch
steps.text: Final QA, deployment, and a smooth handoff so you can run with it.
